The air conditioning is a disaster. The employees are rude and disrespectful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmNGVtdFdREAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar es correcto a nivel servicio pero con precios desorbitados. Diría que el doble de lo que habitualmente sale en un supermercado todo lo que es galletitas o medialunas. Esto se llama abuso de posición dominante. Además me cuesta recordarlo con buen clima producto de que mi hijastra se olvidó una ojotas en el lugar. Que colgada.

(Translated by Google)
The service is decent, but the prices are outrageous. I'd say cookies and croissants cost twice as much as you'd normally get at a supermarket. That's blatant abuse of market power. Plus, I can't remember it fondly because my stepdaughter left a pair of flip-flops there. So careless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmdm9IZXhnRRAB
